TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ciw-cay-kow singanganay aazihan, ngangan Ciw-cay-kow, tini iCong-kow Se-cwan a kuwan amis u A-pa-cang-cu-Cyang-cu misakakuay mikuwan tu cow Ciw-cay-kow a kuwan "yen-Nan-pin a kuwan". Miawas tu tung-cin 103¬į46'~104¬į4', pey-wi32¬į54'~33¬į19'. zayhan sakahini izaw ku su-cen, he-yey, ce-ca-wa,pan-sin, hey-kow, pan-ya-cu, ku-wa, pung-pu, cyen-pan siwa ku Cang-cu a singangan ku say nu niyazu'. Ciw-cay-kow likid nu nanum makaza i Pay-he, Pay-suy-cyang, Cya-lin-cyang, sazikuzay malikid tayza i Cang-cyang. 1992 a mihcaan mala nu kitakit tahakay niliwanan a zaysang. Ciw-cay-kow tini i Cin-cang-kaw-yen nuwalian timulanay Nay-al-na-sanhung-pey-lu, angangan u Min-san buyu'an masacapa maliwasakay i Ze-ce-kow, Ce-ca-wa-kuw, Su-cen-kow, tulu kasa diheb a cilis, talak i 2000 mi katukuh 3106 mi, tungu nu cuedetay nu kitakit nu Ke-s-te-a hekal. . pulung nu hekay pakala tu 620km¬≤, pakala tu 52% pesen ku hekal matahpu nu kilakilangan, zuma simuluay atu cacanan nu micidekay a lutuk balu, katuud ku nu byu'ay a aadupan tayni mihibang, mahizaay u tumay, kalawlaway banuh a ungay, salengacay bilbil a ngabul. i kasienawan Ciw-cay-kow hamin nu bayu banaw taku malakuli tu, uyza canacanan a kuliit zayhan sasaay nu banaw tahkal ku nu buhangay nemnem, nanum nu banaw i kasienawan mahiza tu i 6 tu. Ciw-cay-kow pabaw nu pay-suy a cilis u saciwa' a cilis nu pay-he, siwa ku Cang-cu a niyazu' a singangan. Śú®ŚÜ¨Ś≠£, . labu nu Ciw-cay-kow palasepaten ku tabakiay aazihan, Su-cen aadihan, Ze-ce aazihan, Cng bayu aazihan Paw-cin atepad aazihan, u tingalaway a bayu, matatungduhay a cascas, kilakilangan, sulda a buyu' Cnga-cin "u-cye" a singnangan, mapanganga tu "mung-syen-cin" atu "kitakit akamu nu adiwawa". ,ŤĘęŤ≠ĹÁāļ"Ś§ĘšĽôŚĘÉ" aazihan a piliwkuan śóÖťĀäśôĮŚćÄ miliwku mikacaw tu liwlung kapah ku demiad, caay ka cuedet ku bali, panihiw tu lalud, salungan tu sepat a puu'an, nu kitakitay a kanamuhan nu miliwkuay tayza. Ciw-cay-kow sa u tawyaay bangcal a hekal nu aazihan angangan mababenis i su-cen-cu-kow atu ce-ca-cay, ze-ce tusa ku cipa' nu kow. angangan a kacidek nu tahakay a hekal u buyu'ay a taku atu cascas, masaupu ku taku, cascas, liken nu sauwac, sauwac, suleda a buyu', kilakilangan atu Cangcu malacacay ku balucu' Ciw-cay-kow kasingangan nu hekal aazihan i 1992 a mihcaan mala u kitakitay nu tahakay a niliwanan a zaysang, 1997 a mihcaan u nu kitakit a tademaw atu mauzipay saliyuk a pidiputan, 2000 a mihcaan tu kamu u saayaway nu Cong-kow kanatal 4A ci piazihan nu miliwkuan, 2001 a mihca 2 a bulad maala tu ku "ladaway a hekal 21" cpawacay, 2007 a mihcaan pakal mala ku 5 ci a kanatal piazihan nu miliwkuan, 2021 a mihcaan 9 a bulad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan a lab uku balubaluan katukuh sumamaday a kilakilangan a tumaynani' bayuay a zazan muculil tu ku kazizeng. 2017 a mihcaan maninel ku Ciw-cay-kow 2017ŚĻīšĻĚŚĮ®śļĚŚúįťúá 2017 a mihca 8 a bulad 8 a demiad a labii i piazihan tabaki ku ninel, mahamin tu mapelad. zikuz nu ninel labu nu aazihan angangan sauwac a nanum nu Cyang caay tu katabaki. nika macebeday a kilakilanngan "nanum nu bayu" mulaliw tu amin. 9 a demiad macebeday a kilakilangan a sibali tu, nayi' ku katalaw amapeci'. naizaway tu ku Yen-say taku nanikinsaan nayi' ku katalaw amapeci, baluhay a Yen-say banaw nayi' muculal. hamin nu banaw cayay ka lecad ku nikapeci', yadah ku mapelad nu byu'. Zuw-ze-lang cascas pihaceng ku nikapelad, mala u pinaay tu ku likid nu nanum atu lanu'. "Swang-lung-hay" atu "Lu-wi-hay" mahamin tu malikid, "Law-hu-hay" atu "Lu-wi-hay" pihaceng ku kapeci' a lilis nu apilis, "Si-niw-hay" nuayawanay kilangay langat a zazan atu "aazihan tu nipahabayan a kilang" uyza silangatay ku liwliw a zazan mapeci' tu. namaninel, 2017 a mihca 8 a bulad 9 a demiad malingatu, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan pacena' maedeb, pasatezepe miawza tu midangay a labang. Se-cwan kuwan A-pa-cang-cu cyang-cu ce-ce-cow wiy-su-ci ci Liw-cuw-min hinisa Ciw-cay-kow aaziihan apasasizumaen, pasagatuen haymaw a pahulak, amisumad tu acanu a paya nu panan. Ciw-cay-kow zikuz nu ninel I 2018 a nihca 3 a bulad 8 a demiad pacema' miwawah, demidemiad mitiyang tu micumuday a tademaw cacay a demiad 2000 ku tademaw, miawza tu masakaputay a labang dada', pacena' caay piawza tu sakaku sanay midang a labang, zikuz muliyaw aca maedeb. laed tu pinaay tu a mihcaan aninelan, duduc Ciw-cay-kow nu miliwkuay a sakapu bu-cung-cin-li ci Lyaw-cin a pisiwkay "zuma aadihan paliayaw tu 2019 a mihcaan nu kalimulakay nu kanatal a lisin pahekal tu hekalay". 2019 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 24 a demiad, Se-cwan kuwan misulul ku situngusa tu cenbu, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan pasazumaen ku zuma i 9 a bulad 27 a demiad demiad nu miliwkuay nu kitakit panukas pahelak. 2019 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 27 a demiad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan muliyaw pahelak tu aazihan, mitiyang tu kakitizaan, mitiyang tu ngatu "paydemiad 8 : 30 katukuh 17 : 00" pahekal, cacay a demiad 5000 ku pitiyang tu katuud a labang, mikawaw i wangle micakay tu paya tucek pahelak tu masakaputay, katukuh 11 a bulad 28 a demiad malingatu mipahelak tu sakakuay nu miida a labang, pahelak tu aazihan a kitizaan cacay a demiad tu piawza tu labang sakatuuday a pitiyang makay 8000 ku tademaw pacakat kkatukuh 2 emang tu tademaw. imahini Ciw-cay-kow paya nu panan aazihan, paya nu kazizeng hami i wangle pangangan mipaliayaw micakay, caay tu patizeng tu picakayan a sasingalan. 2021 a mihca 9 a bulad 28 a demiad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan hamin nu kakitizaan panukas a pahelakan, cacay a demiaad miawza tu labang sakatuuday pitiyang muliyaw panukas 4 emang tu ku tademaw.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ¶iw- ¶aj-kow siŇčaŇčanaj aazińßan, ŇčaŇčan ¶iw- ¶aj-kow, tini i ¶oŇč-kow s…ô- ¶wan a kuwan amis u a-pa- ¶aŇč- ¶u- ¶jaŇč- ¶u misakakuaj mikuwan tu ¶ow ¶iw- ¶aj-kow a kuwan "j…ôn-nan-pin a kuwan". miawas tu tuŇč- ¶in ****** Ē~ °~***** Ē~ °, p…ô-wi***** Ē~ °~***** Ē~ °. zajńßan sakańßini izaw ku su- ¶…ôn, ńß…ô-j…ô, ¶…ô- ¶a-wa,pan-sin, ńß…ô-kow, pan-ja- ¶u, ku-wa, puŇč-pu, ¶j…ôn-pan siwa ku ¶aŇč- ¶u a siŇčaŇčan ku saj nu nijazu Ē~ °. ¶iw- ¶aj-kow r~…ĺikid nu nanum makaza i paj-ńß…ô, paj-suj- ¶jaŇč, ¶ja-r~…ĺin- ¶jaŇč, sazikuzaj mar~…ĺikid tajza i ¶aŇč- ¶jaŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu kitakit tańßakaj nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč. ¶iw- ¶aj-kow tini i ¶in- ¶aŇč-kaw-j…ôn nuwar~…ĺian timur~…ĺanaj naj-ar~…ĺ-na-sanńßuŇč-p…ô-r~…ĺu, aŇčaŇčan u min-san buju Ē~ °an masa ¶apa mar~…ĺiwasakaj i z…ô- ¶…ô-kow, ¶…ô- ¶a-wa-kuw, su- ¶…ôn-kow, tur~…ĺu kasa dińß…ôb a ¶ir~…ĺis, tar~…ĺak i **** mi katukuńß **** mi, tuŇču nu ¶u…ôd…ôtaj nu kitakit nu k…ô-s-t…ô-a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. . pur~…ĺuŇč nu ńß…ôkaj pakar~…ĺa tu ***km*, pakar~…ĺa tu **% p…ôs…ôn ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ matańßpu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, zuma simur~…ĺuaj atu ¶a ¶anan nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a r~…ĺutuk bar~…ĺu, katuud ku nu bju Ē~ °aj a aadupan tajni mińßibaŇč, mańßizaaj u tumaj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj banuńß a uŇčaj, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj bir~…ĺbir~…ĺ a Ňčabur~…ĺ. i kasi…ônawan ¶iw- ¶aj-kow ńßamin nu baju banaw taku mar~…ĺakur~…ĺi tu, ujza ¶ana ¶anan a kur~…ĺiit zajńßan sasaaj nu banaw tańßkar~…ĺ ku nu buńßaŇčaj n…ômn…ôm, nanum nu banaw i kasi…ônawan mańßiza tu i * tu. ¶iw- ¶aj-kow pabaw nu paj-suj a ¶ir~…ĺis u sa ¶iwa Ē~ ° a ¶ir~…ĺis nu paj-ńß…ô, siwa ku ¶aŇč- ¶u a nijazu Ē~ ° a siŇčaŇčan. ***, . r~…ĺabu nu ¶iw- ¶aj-kow par~…ĺas…ôpat…ôn ku tabakiaj aazińßan, su- ¶…ôn aadińßan, z…ô- ¶…ô aazińßan, ¶Ňč baju aazińßan paw- ¶in at…ôpad aazińßan, u tiŇčar~…ĺawaj a baju, matatuŇčduńßaj a ¶as ¶as, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, sur~…ĺda a buju Ē~ ° ¶Ňča- ¶in "u- ¶j…ô" a siŇčnaŇčan, mapaŇčaŇča tu "muŇč-sj…ôn- ¶in" atu "kitakit akamu nu adiwawa". ,***"***" aazińßan a pir~…ĺiwkuan **** mir~…ĺiwku mika ¶aw tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺuŇč kapańß ku d…ômiad, ¶aaj ka ¶u…ôd…ôt ku bar~…ĺi, panińßiw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, sar~…ĺuŇčan tu s…ôpat a puu Ē~ °an, nu kitakitaj a kanamuńßan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj tajza. ¶iw- ¶aj-kow sa u tawjaaj baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu aazińßan aŇčaŇčan mabab…ônis i su- ¶…ôn- ¶u-kow atu ¶…ô- ¶a- ¶aj, z…ô- ¶…ô tusa ku ¶ipa Ē~ ° nu kow. aŇčaŇčan a ka ¶id…ôk nu tańßakaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ u buju Ē~ °aj a taku atu ¶as ¶as, masaupu ku taku, ¶as ¶as, r~…ĺik…ôn nu sauwa ¶, sauwa ¶, sur~…ĺ…ôda a buju Ē~ °, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu ¶aŇč ¶u mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶iw- ¶aj-kow kasiŇčaŇčan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ aazińßan i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u kitakitaj nu tańßakaj a nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč, **** a mińß ¶aan u nu kitakit a tad…ômaw atu mauzipaj sar~…ĺijuk a pidiputan, **** a mińß ¶aan tu kamu u saajawaj nu ¶oŇč-kow kanatar~…ĺ *a ¶i piazińßan nu mir~…ĺiwkuan, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad maar~…ĺa tu ku "r~…ĺadawaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ **" ¶pawa ¶aj, **** a mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa ku * ¶i a kanatar~…ĺ piazińßan nu mir~…ĺiwkuan, **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aazińßan a r~…ĺab uku bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan katukuńß sumamadaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a tumajnani Ē~ ° bajuaj a zazan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ku kaziz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan manin…ôr~…ĺ ku ¶iw- ¶aj-kow ********** **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad a r~…ĺabii i piazińßan tabaki ku nin…ôr~…ĺ, mańßamin tu map…ôr~…ĺad. zikuz nu nin…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺabu nu aazińßan aŇčaŇčan sauwa ¶ a nanum nu ¶jaŇč ¶aaj tu katabaki. nika ma ¶…ôb…ôdaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺanŇčan "nanum nu baju" mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu amin. * a d…ômiad ma ¶…ôb…ôdaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a sibar~…ĺi tu, naji Ē~ ° ku katar~…ĺaw amap…ô ¶i Ē~ °. naizawaj tu ku j…ôn-saj taku nanikinsaan naji Ē~ ° ku katar~…ĺaw amap…ô ¶i, bar~…ĺuńßaj a j…ôn-saj banaw naji Ē~ ° mu ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ. ńßamin nu banaw ¶ajaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ °, jadańß ku map…ôr~…ĺad nu bju Ē~ °. zuw-z…ô-r~…ĺaŇč ¶as ¶as pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku nikap…ôr~…ĺad, mar~…ĺa u pinaaj tu ku r~…ĺikid nu nanum atu r~…ĺanu Ē~ °. "swaŇč-r~…ĺuŇč-ńßaj" atu "r~…ĺu-wi-ńßaj" mańßamin tu mar~…ĺikid, "r~…ĺaw-ńßu-ńßaj" atu "r~…ĺu-wi-ńßaj" pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° a r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu apir~…ĺis, "si-niw-ńßaj" nuajawanaj kir~…ĺaŇčaj r~…ĺaŇčat a zazan atu "aazińßan tu nipańßabajan a kir~…ĺaŇč" ujza sir~…ĺaŇčataj ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw a zazan map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu. namanin…ôr~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aazińßan pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° ma…ôd…ôb, pasat…ôz…ôp…ô miawza tu midaŇčaj a r~…ĺabaŇč. s…ô- ¶wan kuwan a-pa- ¶aŇč- ¶u ¶jaŇč- ¶u ¶…ô- ¶…ô- ¶ow wij-su- ¶i ¶i r~…ĺiw- ¶uw-min ńßinisa ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aaziińßan apasasizuma…ôn, pasagatu…ôn ńßajmaw a pańßur~…ĺak, amisumad tu a ¶anu a paja nu panan. ¶iw- ¶aj-kow zikuz nu nin…ôr~…ĺ i **** a nińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad pa ¶…ôma Ē~ ° miwawańß, d…ômid…ômiad mitijaŇč tu mi ¶umudaj a tad…ômaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad **** ku tad…ômaw, miawza tu masakaputaj a r~…ĺabaŇč dada Ē~ °, pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° ¶aaj piawza tu sakaku sanaj midaŇč a r~…ĺabaŇč, zikuz mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a ma…ôd…ôb. r~…ĺa…ôd tu pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan anin…ôr~…ĺan, dudu ¶ ¶iw- ¶aj-kow nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a sakapu bu- ¶uŇč- ¶in-r~…ĺi ¶i r~…ĺjaw- ¶in a pisiwkaj "zuma aadińßan par~…ĺiajaw tu **** a mińß ¶aan nu kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺisin pańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj". **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, s…ô- ¶wan kuwan misur~…ĺur~…ĺ ku situŇčusa tu ¶…ônbu, ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aazińßan pasazuma…ôn ku zuma i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad d…ômiad nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj nu kitakit panukas pańß…ôr~…ĺak. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aazińßan mur~…ĺijaw pańß…ôr~…ĺak tu aazińßan, mitijaŇč tu kakitizaan, mitijaŇč tu Ňčatu "pajd…ômiad * : ** katukuńß ** : **" pańß…ôkar~…ĺ, ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad **** ku pitijaŇč tu katuud a r~…ĺabaŇč, mikawaw i waŇčr~…ĺ…ô mi ¶akaj tu paja tu ¶…ôk pańß…ôr~…ĺak tu masakaputaj, katukuńß ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu mipańß…ôr~…ĺak tu sakakuaj nu miida a r~…ĺabaŇč, pańß…ôr~…ĺak tu aazińßan a kitizaan ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad tu piawza tu r~…ĺabaŇč sakatuudaj a pitijaŇč makaj **** ku tad…ômaw pa ¶akat kkatukuńß * …ômaŇč tu tad…ômaw. imańßini ¶iw- ¶aj-kow paja nu panan aazińßan, paja nu kaziz…ôŇč ńßami i waŇčr~…ĺ…ô paŇčaŇčan mipar~…ĺiajaw mi ¶akaj, ¶aaj tu patiz…ôŇč tu pi ¶akajan a sasiŇčar~…ĺan. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶iw- ¶aj-kow aazińßan ńßamin nu kakitizaan panukas a pańß…ôr~…ĺakan, ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiaad miawza tu r~…ĺabaŇč sakatuudaj pitijaŇč mur~…ĺijaw panukas * …ômaŇč tu ku tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ciw-cay-kow singanganay aazihan, ngangan Ciw-cay-kow, tini iCong-kow Se-cwan a kuwan amis u A-pa-cang-cu-Cyang-cu misakakuay mikuwan tu cow Ciw-cay-kow a kuwan "yen-Nan-pin a kuwan". Miawas tu tung-cin 103¬į46'~104¬į4', pey-wi32¬į54'~33¬į19'. zayhan sakahini izaw ku su-cen, he-yey, ce-ca-wa,pan-sin, hey-kow, pan-ya-cu, ku-wa, pung-pu, cyen-pan siwa ku Cang-cu a singangan ku say nu niyazu'. Ciw-cay-kow likid nu nanum makaza i Pay-he, Pay-suy-cyang, Cya-lin-cyang, sazikuzay malikid tayza i Cang-cyang. 1992 a mihcaan mala nu kitakit tahakay niliwanan a zaysang. Ciw-cay-kow tini i Cin-cang-kaw-yen nuwalian timulanay Nay-al-na-sanhung-pey-lu, angangan u Min-san buyu'an masacapa maliwasakay i Ze-ce-kow, Ce-ca-wa-kuw, Su-cen-kow, tulu kasa diheb a cilis, talak i 2000 mi katukuh 3106 mi, tungu nu cuedetay nu kitakit nu Ke-s-te-a hekal. . pulung nu hekay pakala tu 620km¬≤, pakala tu 52% pesen ku hekal matahpu nu kilakilangan, zuma simuluay atu cacanan nu micidekay a lutuk balu, katuud ku nu byu'ay a aadupan tayni mihibang, mahizaay u tumay, kalawlaway banuh a ungay, salengacay bilbil a ngabul. i kasienawan Ciw-cay-kow hamin nu bayu banaw taku malakuli tu, uyza canacanan a kuliit zayhan sasaay nu banaw tahkal ku nu buhangay nemnem, nanum nu banaw i kasienawan mahiza tu i 6 tu. Ciw-cay-kow pabaw nu pay-suy a cilis u saciwa' a cilis nu pay-he, siwa ku Cang-cu a niyazu' a singangan. Śú®ŚÜ¨Ś≠£, . labu nu Ciw-cay-kow palasepaten ku tabakiay aazihan, Su-cen aadihan, Ze-ce aazihan, Cng bayu aazihan Paw-cin atepad aazihan, u tingalaway a bayu, matatungduhay a cascas, kilakilangan, sulda a buyu' Cnga-cin "u-cye" a singnangan, mapanganga tu "mung-syen-cin" atu "kitakit akamu nu adiwawa". ,ŤĘęŤ≠ĹÁāļ"Ś§ĘšĽôŚĘÉ" aazihan a piliwkuan śóÖťĀäśôĮŚćÄ miliwku mikacaw tu liwlung kapah ku demiad, caay ka cuedet ku bali, panihiw tu lalud, salungan tu sepat a puu'an, nu kitakitay a kanamuhan nu miliwkuay tayza. Ciw-cay-kow sa u tawyaay bangcal a hekal nu aazihan angangan mababenis i su-cen-cu-kow atu ce-ca-cay, ze-ce tusa ku cipa' nu kow. angangan a kacidek nu tahakay a hekal u buyu'ay a taku atu cascas, masaupu ku taku, cascas, liken nu sauwac, sauwac, suleda a buyu', kilakilangan atu Cangcu malacacay ku balucu' Ciw-cay-kow kasingangan nu hekal aazihan i 1992 a mihcaan mala u kitakitay nu tahakay a niliwanan a zaysang, 1997 a mihcaan u nu kitakit a tademaw atu mauzipay saliyuk a pidiputan, 2000 a mihcaan tu kamu u saayaway nu Cong-kow kanatal 4A ci piazihan nu miliwkuan, 2001 a mihca 2 a bulad maala tu ku "ladaway a hekal 21" cpawacay, 2007 a mihcaan pakal mala ku 5 ci a kanatal piazihan nu miliwkuan, 2021 a mihcaan 9 a bulad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan a lab uku balubaluan katukuh sumamaday a kilakilangan a tumaynani' bayuay a zazan muculil tu ku kazizeng. 2017 a mihcaan maninel ku Ciw-cay-kow 2017ŚĻīšĻĚŚĮ®śļĚŚúįťúá 2017 a mihca 8 a bulad 8 a demiad a labii i piazihan tabaki ku ninel, mahamin tu mapelad. zikuz nu ninel labu nu aazihan angangan sauwac a nanum nu Cyang caay tu katabaki. nika macebeday a kilakilanngan "nanum nu bayu" mulaliw tu amin. 9 a demiad macebeday a kilakilangan a sibali tu, nayi' ku katalaw amapeci'. naizaway tu ku Yen-say taku nanikinsaan nayi' ku katalaw amapeci, baluhay a Yen-say banaw nayi' muculal. hamin nu banaw cayay ka lecad ku nikapeci', yadah ku mapelad nu byu'. Zuw-ze-lang cascas pihaceng ku nikapelad, mala u pinaay tu ku likid nu nanum atu lanu'. "Swang-lung-hay" atu "Lu-wi-hay" mahamin tu malikid, "Law-hu-hay" atu "Lu-wi-hay" pihaceng ku kapeci' a lilis nu apilis, "Si-niw-hay" nuayawanay kilangay langat a zazan atu "aazihan tu nipahabayan a kilang" uyza silangatay ku liwliw a zazan mapeci' tu. namaninel, 2017 a mihca 8 a bulad 9 a demiad malingatu, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan pacena' maedeb, pasatezepe miawza tu midangay a labang. Se-cwan kuwan A-pa-cang-cu cyang-cu ce-ce-cow wiy-su-ci ci Liw-cuw-min hinisa Ciw-cay-kow aaziihan apasasizumaen, pasagatuen haymaw a pahulak, amisumad tu acanu a paya nu panan. Ciw-cay-kow zikuz nu ninel I 2018 a nihca 3 a bulad 8 a demiad pacema' miwawah, demidemiad mitiyang tu micumuday a tademaw cacay a demiad 2000 ku tademaw, miawza tu masakaputay a labang dada', pacena' caay piawza tu sakaku sanay midang a labang, zikuz muliyaw aca maedeb. laed tu pinaay tu a mihcaan aninelan, duduc Ciw-cay-kow nu miliwkuay a sakapu bu-cung-cin-li ci Lyaw-cin a pisiwkay "zuma aadihan paliayaw tu 2019 a mihcaan nu kalimulakay nu kanatal a lisin pahekal tu hekalay". 2019 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 24 a demiad, Se-cwan kuwan misulul ku situngusa tu cenbu, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan pasazumaen ku zuma i 9 a bulad 27 a demiad demiad nu miliwkuay nu kitakit panukas pahelak. 2019 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 27 a demiad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan muliyaw pahelak tu aazihan, mitiyang tu kakitizaan, mitiyang tu ngatu "paydemiad 8 : 30 katukuh 17 : 00" pahekal, cacay a demiad 5000 ku pitiyang tu katuud a labang, mikawaw i wangle micakay tu paya tucek pahelak tu masakaputay, katukuh 11 a bulad 28 a demiad malingatu mipahelak tu sakakuay nu miida a labang, pahelak tu aazihan a kitizaan cacay a demiad tu piawza tu labang sakatuuday a pitiyang makay 8000 ku tademaw pacakat kkatukuh 2 emang tu tademaw. imahini Ciw-cay-kow paya nu panan aazihan, paya nu kazizeng hami i wangle pangangan mipaliayaw micakay, caay tu patizeng tu picakayan a sasingalan. 2021 a mihca 9 a bulad 28 a demiad, Ciw-cay-kow aazihan hamin nu kakitizaan panukas a pahelakan, cacay a demiaad miawza tu labang sakatuuday pitiyang muliyaw panukas 4 emang tu ku tademaw.
